description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in a futuristic, urban-inspired outfit with angular, layered garments. The character wears a high-collared jacket with asymmetrical shoulder armor and matching wrist guards, all featuring bold accent lines and panels. His pants are fitted and tucked into high, thick-soled boots, and a utility pouch is attached to his belt. The figure has a full beard and his hair is tied back in a short ponytail, with visible facial markings or tattoos on the side of his head. The overall appearance suggests a confident, alert stance, suitable for a modern or near-future city environment.
description: A stylized adult male in a futuristic, layered urban outfit with a high-collared jacket, shoulder armor, and boots, standing upright with a ponytail and facial markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high-collared jacket, facial features, beard, and chest armor details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ponytail, side facial markings, and the layered structure of the jacket and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the jacket, ponytail, and the utility pouch on the belt.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the facial profile, arm guards, and the layered clothing from another angle.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic layered jacket with high collar, asymmetrical shoulder armor, fitted pants, and utility belt
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair tied in a ponytail with shaved sides
